# Sail to Speak & Scale 2027

> A 7-day international speakers cruise experience sailing from Athens to Barcelona aboard the Virgin Voyages Scarlet Lady, October 24–31, 2027. Every participant gets real stage time, professional content capture, and strategic networking with other speakers, coaches, authors, and entrepreneurs.

## Event Details
- **Event**: Sail to Speak & Scale 2027
- **Type**: International speakers cruise and business accelerator
- **Dates**: October 24–31, 2027
- **Route**: Athens, Greece (embarkation) → Mykonos, Greece → Amalfi Coast, Italy → Cannes, France → Barcelona, Spain (debarkation)
- **Ship**: Virgin Voyages Scarlet Lady (adults-only luxury cruise)
- **Deposit**: $400 fully refundable deposit to secure your spot
- **Early Bonus**: $200 onboard credit for deposits placed before April 30, 2027

## What Makes This Different
- Every participant speaks — not just attends
- Professional photo and video content capture included
- Strategic networking with collaborators, not just attendees
- International speaker positioning — become a global speaker
- Leader tier available with extended speaking time and featured positioning

## What Participants Walk Away With
1. A recorded, refined signature talk
2. Elevated speaker authority positioning
3. Professional photo and video content
4. Strategic partnerships and collaborations
5. Momentum toward more stages and more income

## Organizers
- **Dannella Burnett** — Founder, Speakers Need to Speak
- **Steve Eriksen** — Founder & CEO, Event Raptor
- **Jennie Eriksen** — Co-Founder, Event Raptor
- **Robert Evans** — Co-Founder, Actionera
